originalTitle: Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek - Official Crossover Event Announcement Trailer
content: Take a look at the announcement trailer for Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation’s Shrek crossover event. Ubisoft, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences, announced the crossover event launching on July 29. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion. The event will also include a Map featuring Shrek’s iconic Swamp and other items inspired by fairy tale creatures. Additional details on the crossover and those other Items will be shared at a later date. The Brawlhalla x Shrek crossover event is launching on July 29.
chineseContent: 看看《神殿大乱斗》与梦工厂动画的《怪物史莱克》联动活动的公告预告片。育碧与 Universal Products & Experiences 合作，宣布将于 7 月 29 日启动联动活动。这次合作将电影中令人难忘的角色——怪物史莱克、菲奥娜和穿靴子的猫——从深受喜爱的系列中引入到《哈拉神殿大乱斗》中作为可玩角色，并以驴子为伙伴。该活动还将包括一张地图，其中包含史莱克标志性的沼泽和其他受童话生物启发的物品。有关跨界车和其他项目的更多详细信息将在稍后分享。 《神殿大乱斗》与《怪物史莱克》联动活动将于 7 月 29 日启动。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
